DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-27-2002 Overruled
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT:
APPEAR: Jak S. Marquez, Esq. 956-6488 for pltf & opposing party; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling (DEMURRER overruled. Complaint states cause of action for breach of contract. Co-owner can bring complaint on behalf of other co-owner). Order signed in open court. (AJR/302/ks-x) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193
